name: archon-qwen-autopilot
description: Archon Autopilot — a Track-4 accounts-payable orchestration agent. A bounded Qwen function-calling loop recalls vendor evidence, validates invoices, detects duplicates/anomalies, and proposes one terminal action behind an authenticated human gate. Its state machine, idempotent work-item store, correction feedback, and durable execution ledger are the product; vector memory is one read-only evidence input.

scripts.test:unit: node --import tsx --test tests/unit/eval-artifact-safety.test.ts tests/unit/embeddings.test.ts tests/unit/memory.test.ts tests/unit/normalize.test.ts tests/unit/validate.test.ts tests/unit/tools.test.ts tests/unit/smtp-sink.test.ts tests/unit/ledger-sink.test.ts tests/unit/deps.test.ts tests/unit/analysis-tools.test.ts tests/unit/loop.test.ts tests/unit/workflow.test.ts tests/unit/rate-limit.test.ts tests/unit/vision.test.ts tests/unit/server.test.ts tests/unit/skills.test.ts tests/unit/mcp.test.ts tests/security/upload-guard.test.ts tests/security/codeql-sarif-gate.test.ts tests/pentest/excessive-agency.test.ts tests/pentest/prompt-injection.test.ts tests/pentest/authz-hitl.test.ts tests/pentest/sensitive-data-exposure.test.ts tests/pentest/sink-injection.test.ts
